name: cribsheet
description: crib — persistent cross-session markdown memory + a code symbol index for your AI. Ships the `/crib` recall command and registers the crib MCP server via sharedserver; set MCP_COMBINER=1 and it stands down when a combiner already serves crib.

plugins.name: cribsheet
plugins.description: Persistent markdown memory + a code symbol index (concept/name lookup, call graph, references, learnings) for your AI. Registers the crib MCP server via sharedserver and keeps one warm crib shared across sessions, carries the reach-for-crib instructions, and ships the `/crib` command. Set MCP_COMBINER=1 (or MCP_COMBINER_SERVES_CRIBSHEET) when a combiner already serves crib and it will not register a second copy.
